site.credit: Designed with a custom editorial interface — no template look.

about.title: Research-driven, field-tested, and community-focused
focusAreas: GIS, Remote Sensing, UAV and Satellite Data
Survey Design, Data Collection and Analysis
paragraphs: I combine agricultural economics, field-based socioeconomic research, GIS and remote sensing, and youth leadership to support practical solutions for sustainable agriculture and rural development.

My experience includes research assistance in GIS and remote sensing laboratories, sustainable aviation fuel feedstock feasibility studies, aquaculture supply-chain research, farm profitability analysis, consumer preference studies, and large-scale survey operations.
Alongside research, I have led and coordinated national-level entrepreneurship and youth programs, mentoring students, managing teams, and building active innovation communities.

contact.title: Let’s collaborate on sustainable agriculture, spatial research, and youth innovation.
contact.message: I am interested in research collaboration, PhD opportunities, GIS/RS projects, agribusiness studies, youth innovation programs and field-based data collection projects.

personal.name: Akif Bin Sayeed
personal.headline: Agricultural Economics | GIS & Remote Sensing | Youth Leadership
personal.shortIntro: A multidisciplinary young professional working across agricultural economics, agribusiness research, GIS & remote sensing, sustainability, entrepreneurship development, and national-level youth initiatives.
personal.availability: Open to research collaboration, PhD opportunities, consulting, and innovation programs
personal.profileCaptionText: Field research, spatial analysis, agribusiness studies, and youth innovation programs.

projects.title: GIS & Remote Sensing for Crop Monitoring
projects.description: Integration of drone imagery, multispectral data, satellite imagery and spatial analysis for crop growth monitoring, precision agriculture and environmental assessment.

projects.title: Feedstock Oil Crop Cultivation for Sustainable Aviation Fuel
projects.description: Feasibility assessment of feedstock oil crops for sustainable aviation fuel production in Bangladesh using field surveys, land-use information and sustainability-related data.

projects.title: Coffee Origin Perception and Consumer Preference
projects.description: A study involving tribal coffee farmers and urban consumers to understand coffee origin perception, purchasing behavior and farm-level profitability.

projects.title: Carp Biosecurity and Aquaculture Supply Chain
projects.description: Research support for aquaculture biosecurity and supply-chain analysis across multiple districts in Bangladesh.

education.degree: Master of Science (MS) in Agroforestry and Environment
education.institution: Bangladesh Agricultural University / Gazipur Agricultural University (GAU)

education.degree: Bachelor of Science (BS) in Agricultural Economics
education.institution: Bangabandhu Sheikh Mujibur Rahman Agricultural University (BSMRAU), Gazipur

experiences.title: Research Assistant
experiences.summary: Supporting GIS and remote sensing-based agricultural and environmental research using spatial datasets, drone imagery, multispectral imagery, and satellite data.
highlights: Assisting with crop monitoring and precision agriculture field experiments.
Supporting data management, preprocessing, and interpretation of remotely sensed data.
Working with RGB, RedEdge, infrared and satellite imagery for agricultural analysis.
experiences.organization: GIS & Remote Sensing Laboratory, Gazipur Agricultural University (GAU)

experiences.title: Research Assistant
experiences.summary: Sponsored by Euglena Co., Ltd., Japan, this field study assessed the feasibility of feedstock oil crop production for SAF supply-chain development in Bangladesh.
highlights: Conducted field surveys among indigenous and tribal communities in the Chittagong Hill Tracts.
Collected socioeconomic, land-use, water availability and environmental data from more than 200 respondents.
Supported sustainability and greenhouse-gas-related data analysis.
experiences.organization: Feasibility Study on Feedstock Oil Crop Cultivation for Sustainable Aviation Fuel

experiences.title: Research Assistant
experiences.summary: Worked on farm-level and consumer-level research connecting tribal coffee farmers, urban consumers, origin perception and agribusiness economics.
highlights: Collected data from more than 80 tribal coffee farmers and more than 200 urban consumers.
Assisted questionnaire development and refinement.
Integrated farm-level economic analysis including variable cost and BCR estimation.
experiences.organization: Coffee Consumer Preference and Origin Perception Study, Department of Agribusiness

experiences.title: Data Enumerator & Data Analyst
experiences.summary: Funded by USAID Feed the Future, Texas State University, Mississippi State University and Bangladesh Agricultural University.
highlights: Interviewed hatchery owners, fish farmers and supply-chain actors across Bangladesh.
Supported biosecurity-related research in aquaculture systems.
Participated in data cleaning, organization and preliminary statistical analysis.
experiences.organization: Carp Biosecurity and Aquaculture Supply Chain Project

experiences.title: Research Intern
experiences.summary: Project: Financial Profitability Analysis of Binadhan-16 at Farm Level.
highlights: Evaluated profitability indicators including cost, return and net benefit.
Collected farmer-level production and management data.
Prepared analytical reports and findings.

experiences.title: Field Interviewer → Supervisor → Recruiter & Data Collection Trainer
experiences.summary: Progressed from field interviewer to supervisory and recruitment responsibilities based on performance in market research operations.
highlights: Supervised survey teams across multiple districts.
Collected and monitored over 2,000 survey responses.
Recruited and trained data collectors while ensuring survey quality control.

experiences.title: On-Campus Coordinator
experiences.summary: Mentoring campus directors and coordinating national-level entrepreneurship and innovation activities across Bangladesh.
highlights: Spending approximately 25-30 hours weekly supporting entrepreneurial ecosystems.
Guiding students in startup development, pitching and competition preparation.
Mentored winning and finalist teams from Bangladesh, India and Pakistan.

experiences.title: Campus Director
experiences.summary: Led campus-wide execution of Hult Prize programs, including recruitment, logistics, sponsorship communication and team management.
highlights: Reached approximately 1,500 students through promotional campaigns.
Organized workshops, promotional activities and startup-focused events.
Built a large and active organizing team.

experiences.title: Secretary General
experiences.summary: Led an active student volunteer organization organizing social awareness, cultural, mental health and youth development programs.
highlights: Managed large-scale events with audiences ranging from hundreds to over a thousand participants.
Coordinated membership expansion and volunteer management.
Organized mental health awareness and youth engagement programs.
experiences.organization: Prothom Alo Bondhushava - GAU / BSMRAU Unit

experiences.title: Organizer
experiences.summary: Contributed to a national entrepreneurship summit with participation from more than 60 universities.
highlights: Managed logistics, communication and stakeholder coordination.
Supported networking among students, mentors, judges and entrepreneurs.
experiences.organization: Hult Prize National Summit Bangladesh 2025, Chittagong University

experiences.title: Organizer
experiences.summary: Organized youth-focused career development sessions on corporate skills and personal branding.
highlights: Coordinated speakers, participants and promotional activities.
experiences.organization: Career Compass: Mastering Corporate World & Personal Branding

experiences.title: Organizer
experiences.summary: Promoted agribusiness entrepreneurship and career awareness among students.
highlights: Managed speaker communication and event execution.
experiences.organization: Master Class on Agribusiness Career & Entrepreneurship

achievements: First Runner-Up and Regional Finalist (Kolkata) - Hult Prize OnCampus 2021
Chief of Staff - Hult Prize BSMRAU 2023
On-Campus Coordinator - Hult Prize Bangladesh National Team
Mentored and supported winning/finalist teams across South Asia
